objectives: Identify stable elements in the DOM for automation
Create robust XPath and CSS selector strategies
Reduce locator flakiness through consistent locator conventions
learning_path.title: Web Fundamentals for Reliable Automation: DOM, HTML/CSS, and Locators

objectives: Write maintainable automation code structures
Use functions, data structures, and error handling for test code
Apply consistent coding practices for automation projects
learning_path.title: Programming Foundations for Test Automation

objectives: Create and execute test suites using a unit test framework
Organize tests with setup/teardown and assertions
Run tests locally with repeatable commands
learning_path.title: Unit Test Frameworks and Test Runners Setup

objectives: Initialize an automation project with dependencies
Manage versions and resolve dependency conflicts
Standardize project execution via build scripts
learning_path.title: Build and Dependency Management for Automation Projects

objectives: Automate core user flows using a test automation framework
Handle waits, navigation, and common UI interactions
Stabilize tests by reducing timing and locator issues
learning_path.title: UI Test Automation with Selenium/Cypress/Playwright

objectives: Implement Page Object Model to improve maintainability
Apply data-driven approaches to expand coverage efficiently
Refactor tests to reduce duplication and improve readability
skills: Test Design & Automation Patterns (Page Object Model, Data-Driven)
learning_path.title: Test Design and Automation Patterns: POM and Data-Driven

objectives: Design and automate REST and SOAP test cases
Validate status codes, payloads, and schemas
Integrate API tests into automated test suites
learning_path.title: API Testing: REST and SOAP Automation

objectives: Use branching and merging to manage automation changes
Resolve conflicts and maintain a clean commit history
Apply consistent repository structure for automation projects
learning_path.title: Version Control for Automation: Git Workflows

objectives: Create pipelines to run automated tests on each change
Publish test results and enforce quality gates
Parameterize pipelines for different environments
learning_path.title: CI/CD for Automated Testing with Jenkins/GitHub Actions/GitLab CI

objectives: Select appropriate automation technology for given testing needs
Design reusable automation components for scalability
Define component boundaries to improve maintainability
prerequisites: Test Design & Automation Patterns (Page Object Model, Data-Driven)
learning_path.title: Automation Technology and Component Design

objectives: Install, configure, and run open source software used in automation
Troubleshoot common runtime and configuration issues
Maintain repeatable local environments for automation execution
learning_path.title: Operating Open Source Software in Automation Toolchains

objectives: Align automation work with production processes and release cycles
Plan and track personal professional development goals
Apply process discipline to sustain automation quality over time
learning_path.title: Production Processes and Professional Development for Automation Delivery

objectives: Create technical diagrams to document automation architecture
Maintain consistent diagram standards for team communication
Update diagrams to reflect changes in automation components
learning_path.title: Technical Drawing Software for Automation Documentation

matched_occupation.description: Automation engineers research, design, and develop applications and systems for the automation of the production process. They implement technology and reduce, whenever applicable, human input to reach the full potential of industrial robotics. Automation engineers oversee the process and ensure all systems run safely and smoothly.
matched_occupation.label: automation engineer
